summary: Export v2: schema-isolated COPY corpus with atomic swap
description: Refactor scripts/export.py to produce a self-contained Postgres SQL artifact using COPY format, schema-qualified tables (corpus_new.*), inline validation, and an atomic schema swap. This is the producer side of the cross-repo corpus contract.

resolution.note: Export v2 implemented: COPY format, schema-qualified DDL (corpus_new), inline validation (schema_version + chunk_count), atomic ALTER SCHEMA swap. SCHEMA_VERSION bumped to 2. All 173 tests pass.
